---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature in as much detail as you can. If you have ideas about the API shape, MCP tool schema, or implementation approach, include them here.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why do you prefer the proposed solution?

## Platform scope

- [ ] Uber Eats
- [ ] Thuisbezorgd
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Not platform-specific (e.g. shared types, MCP server, tooling)

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots that might help.
